name: Existence Theory

design_artifacts.title: 森模体 Sylvan Model Organism
design_artifacts.description: A visual HTML design for a naturally grown analog model organism that uses morphology, fluid flow, chemical waves, mycelial routing, and mineral memory to run model-like inference.

design_artifacts.title: Sylvan Alpha Builder
design_artifacts.description: An interactive Alpha-0 field simulator and staged roadmap for turning the Sylvan species design into a closed, measurable, repeatable analog-computing prototype.

design_artifacts.title: 森模体 Sylvan Alpha 落地手册
design_artifacts.description: A safe staged manual for building Sylvan Alpha without wild release, genetic modification, or unknown environmental cultures.

design_artifacts.title: Sylvan Alpha 实验记录模板
design_artifacts.description: A repeatable lab-note template for documenting Sylvan Alpha input, readout, metrics, failures, and existence-strength updates.

core_rule: All existing things preserve their own existence through continuous outward action and inward adjustment.
